title: AFN Testifies in SCIA Fish Hearing
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – Today, the Alaska Federation of Natives participated in a field hearing called by the U.S. Senate Committee on Indian Affairs in Bethel titled, “The Impact of the Historic Salmon Decline on the Health and Well-Being of Alaska Native Communities along Arctic, Yukon, Kuskokwim Rive...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 6 November, 2023
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 6 November, 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
